scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within bioinformatics data processing scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: No methodological fallacies detected; outputs apply standard approaches appropriate to bioinformatics data processing tasks.

code_usability.detail: Generated code executed without syntax errors or unresolvable dependency failures across all tested inputs.

functional_suitability.note: CONFLICTING_EVIDENCE flag now defined with trigger condition; VUS clinical review recommendation added; all v1 gaps closed

reliability.note: Fallback template present; --demo mode for testing; conflicting evidence handling now specified

performance_context.note: No references/ folder; SKILL.md is 144 lines — acceptable; no progressive disclosure

agent_usability.note: Verbatim refusal requirement added; CONFLICTING_EVIDENCE flag definition in Returns; VUS review recommendation in Output Requirements

human_usability.note: Description is discoverable for clinical geneticists; ACMG guideline reference adds credibility

security.note: Data Safety Check now mandatory before VCF processing; Data Exposure elevated to High in Risk Assessment

maintainability.note: Clean script separation; standard library only; all v1 fixes applied cleanly

agent_specific.note: Verbatim refusal prevents speculative interpretation; escape hatches strengthened; composability good via VCF batch mode

key_strengths: Data Safety Check now mandatory before VCF processing, closing the primary v1 PII gap for genomic data
CONFLICTING_EVIDENCE flag with explicit trigger condition (≥2 tools disagree) provides consistent clinical utility
VUS clinical genetics review recommendation now mandated in Output Requirements
Integration of five complementary prediction tools with documented thresholds provides a robust multi-evidence framework
--demo mode enables rapid functional verification without requiring real variant data

recommendations.title: Verbatim refusal enforcement depends on model compliance
recommendations.problem: The 'respond verbatim' instruction and 'no speculative interpretation' rule are documented but cannot be mechanically enforced, leaving a residual risk of minor deviations.
recommendations.root_cause: Instruction-based constraints are advisory; model behavior may vary.
recommendations.fix: Consider adding a concrete negative example to the Input Validation section showing what NOT to include in a refusal response, to reinforce the constraint.

recommendations.title: No population frequency (gnomAD) integration documented
recommendations.problem: Population allele frequency from gnomAD is a key ACMG criterion (BA1, BS1) but is not mentioned as an integrated data source.
recommendations.root_cause: Integrated Scores table covers in-silico predictors only; population databases not addressed.
recommendations.fix: Add a note in the Integrated Scores section: 'Population frequency data (gnomAD) is not integrated; users should manually check gnomAD for BA1/BS1 ACMG criteria.'
